analysis: Checked 1260-1440s currencyservice. Socket dev=+5.0 and mem dev=+3.9 to +4.8 persist across all windows. CPU normal (dev=-0.5). Traces show normal latency. Root cause is socket pressure.

Checked 720-900s checkoutservice metrics. CPU dev +4.7 to +58.5% and latency.p90 dev +5.3 to +29.8% confirm severe resource contention. Traces show high self_p99 latency. Logs show normal order flow. Root cause is checkoutservice CPU saturation.

Checked 1080-1260s recommendationservice. Sustained mem spikes (dev=+1844 to +7201) and latency.p90 dev=+24593 to +30531 confirm memory exhaustion as root cause. Traces show high self-latency consistent with mem pressure. Ranking updated to recommendationservice_mem first.

Checked 1260-1440s checkoutservice. Latency.p90 dev=+93 to +243 persists. Traces show self_p99 spikes (up to 3.4s) for GetProduct/Charge, confirming internal latency. Mem/socket normal. Root cause is checkoutservice latency.

Checked 1260-1440s checkoutservice. Latency.p90 dev=+366-+398 and latency.p50 dev=+92-+108 persist. Traces show self latency ~200ms (dev=+360-+410), confirming internal latency spike. CPU/mem normal. Root cause is checkoutservice latency.

Checked 1260-1440s checkoutservice metrics. diskio dev=+10B sustained confirms extreme I/O saturation as root cause. Traces show high latency but metrics validate diskio. Implication: checkoutservice diskio is definitive.
